nodes.name: GitHub CI Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives POST from GitHub Actions after each CI run. Payload includes run_id, repo, branch, commit_sha, pr_number.

nodes.name: List CI Artifacts
nodes.notes: Gets the list of artifacts from the GitHub API for this run. Looks for 'jest-results' artifact.

nodes.name: Find Artifact IDs
nodes.notes: Extracts download URLs for jest-results and playwright-report artifacts.

nodes.name: Download Jest Results (ZIP)
nodes.notes: Downloads the jest-results artifact as a ZIP file. GitHub returns a ZIP even for single files.

nodes.name: Extract ZIP Contents
nodes.notes: Extracts jest-backend-results.json and jest-integration-results.json from the ZIP.

nodes.name: Parse + Merge Test Results
nodes.notes: Flattens all Jest JSON files into a single clean payload to send to Claude.

body.system:
You are an expert software testing analyst. You will be given Jest and/or Playwright test results in JSON format.

Analyse for: (1) Failed tests — classify by: assertion_error, timeout, import_error, setup_teardown, unexpected_exception, unknown. (2) Brittle tests — hard-coded IDs/timestamps, exact error message assertions, zero assertions, 8+ assertions per test, names with temp/todo/fix/skip. (3) Anti-patterns — duplicate test names, single-test suites, zero-test suites. (4) Flaky tests from history. (5) Suggest ONE valuable new test.

Return ONLY valid JSON matching this exact schema (no preamble):
{"run_summary":{"total_tests":0,"passed":0,"failed":0,"skipped":0,"duration_ms":0,"overall_health":"healthy|degraded|critical","health_reason":"string"},"failed_tests":[{"name":"string","suite":"string","failure_type":"string","error_message":"string","fix_hint":"string"}],"brittle_tests":[{"name":"string","suite":"string","reason":"string","recommendation":"string"}],"anti_patterns":[{"suite":"string","pattern":"string","details":"string"}],"flaky_tests":[{"name":"string","suite":"string","fail_count_last_5":0,"recommendation":"string"}],"suggested_new_test":{"test_name":"string","target_suite":"string","what_to_assert":"string","rationale":"string"},"top_priority_fixes":["string"]}

nodes.name: Call Claude API
nodes.notes: Sends flattened test results to Claude claude-opus-4-5. Response is structured JSON analysis.

nodes.name: Format PR Comment
nodes.notes: Parses Claude's JSON response and formats it as a readable Markdown comment for the GitHub PR.

nodes.name: Is this a PR?
nodes.notes: Only post a PR comment if this was triggered by a pull_request event (has a pr_number).

nodes.name: Post GitHub PR Comment
nodes.notes: Posts the formatted analysis as a comment on the GitHub Pull Request.

nodes.name: Respond to Webhook
nodes.notes: Sends a response back to the GitHub Actions curl call so it doesn't time out.

meta.description: CS4218 AI-driven testing: analyses Jest + Playwright results from GitHub Actions using Claude, posts findings to PR comments.
